name: Claim for work hearing damage got denied in Ogden—what now?
description: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days; bolster with expert medical proof.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: Claim for work hearing damage got denied in Ogden—what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days; bolster with expert medical proof.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal the denial to the Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of decision, then possibly to appeals board or court.[1][2] Many denials reverse with better medical evidence or legal arguments.[5] Key factors: Common denial reasons include protection use or causation disputes; strengthen with independent audiologist and noise study.[1][3] Gather all records, file motion for review immediately, consider attorney for hearings.[1] Acting fast preserves benefits like medical care and disability pay.[2]
